_comment: Per-set approved storyboard iter (gallery numbering, post-pencil-flip schema). Iter 1 = col G (pencil from nano_banana_2 + bibles), Iter 2 = col H (pencil iter 2). vidgen should default to this iter as the storyboard ref unless overridden. fal_vidgen.py / flora_run.py: pass --iter <approved_iter> to use the right column.
